description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a long, ribbed barrel and a robust, angular receiver. The body is predominantly matte black with subtle metallic highlights, giving it a high-tech, industrial appearance. The barrel is vented with a series of evenly spaced cutouts along the top, suggesting heat dissipation or weight reduction. The stock is minimalistic, resembling a pistol grip with an integrated shoulder rest, and the trigger guard is large and angular, likely to accommodate gloved hands. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, and the weapon is detailed with small accents and mechanical features. This shotgun would look at home in a modern or near-future urban environment, such as a police armory or tactical response scenario.
description: A futuristic, matte black shotgun with a ribbed, vented barrel and a tactical, angular design. It features a pistol grip stock and prominent mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the ribbed barrel, angular receiver, and pistol grip stock.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the vented barrel and the narrow profile of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mechanical details, ribbing, and the structure of the grip and stock.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the undercarriage, trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with prominent ribbing and venting along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, angular trigger guard with a squared profile and ample space
